items.title: Weekly Commentary: A Feature, Not A Bug
items.description: Companies borrowed a record $207B in the US investment-grade market in Sept., more than Wall Street's top underwriter of the debt, Bank of America, expected. Read more here.

items.title: Government Shutdown 2025: Why Prolonged Gridlock Could Trigger Sharp Interest Rate Cuts
items.description: Government shutdowns impact markets, jobs, and investment strategies. Read here for an analysis of the current economy here.
